scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['build', '.next/types', '.next/server', '.next/static'].forEach(p => { try { fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch(e){} }); try { fs.readdirSync('.next/cache').forEach(f => { fs.rmSync('.next/cache/' + f, { recursive: true, force: true }); }); } catch(e){}" && next build
